posts.title: Shipping a mock API in minutes
posts.body: Point zero-mock at a JSON file and iterate on your UI without waiting on backend tickets.

posts.title: Why atomic writes matter
posts.body: Your JSON file stays the source of truth—even when multiple tabs hit the API at once.

posts.title: Frontend-first workflows
posts.body: Prototype with realistic CRUD, then swap the mock for a production API when you are ready.
